operators.falsified_by: only one stable state under all contexts
partner context has no directional effect
operators.perturbation_should: partner removal or stabilization shifts state occupancy

operators.falsified_by: one averaged state explains all holdouts
operators.pushes_toward: state conflict rather than averaged consensus fold

predicted_falsifiers: only one stable state under all contexts
partner context has no directional effect

grammar_rule.falsification_rule: holdout supports only one state under all contexts
grammar_rule.null_control: single averaged consensus fold is rejected
grammar_rule.state_change: one context-favored basin to competing alpha/beta state distribution
grammar_rule.testable_effect: context or partner perturbations shift basin occupancy
